chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-175 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 22-07-2025 Ms. Fareeda, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Nadeem Khan Lashari, Advocate for private respondents. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG. ***** Alleged detainee Mai Hajani along with four children is produced by Darul Aman Authorities. On the last date of hearing i.e. 21.07.2025, two children were produced by father (petitioner) and two children by mother, alleged detainee. Today, alleged detainee submits that on the last date of hearing, she had come along with her parents and now she intends to go with them along with four children. Since the children are minors; therefore, their custody is handed over to her mother, the alleged detainee and she is allowed to go with her father Abdul Waheed and mother, who are present in the Court. Darul Aman authorities may be informed accordingly. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
